name: Fertilizers & soil health
description: Balanced NPK, organic amendments, and calcium for vigorous growth and fruit quality in vegetable beds and containers.

name: Disease & pest control
description: Fungicides, botanical oils, and biologicals chosen for small-scale vegetable gardens—always follow label rates and pre-harvest intervals.

name: Vegetable seeds
description: Open-pollinated and hybrid varieties suited to home gardens; many selections emphasize vigor and common field resistances.

name: Tools & safety
description: Sprayers, cutting tools, metering, and gloves so applications are even, accurate, and comfortable.
